name: Etapa MCP
description: AI cycling coach MCP server — get training plans and beginner guidance through any MCP-compatible assistant.

ETAPA_API_URL.description: Base URL of the Etapa API. Leave default unless you're self-hosting Etapa.

MCP_AUTH_TOKEN.description: Optional bearer token. Leave empty for a public MCP, or set any string to require `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on all requests.
